# Genesis Kreations

> Genesis Kreations is a Chennai-based media house offering a media academy, digital marketing, video/film production, studio rental, and broadcasting services.

## Pages

- [Home](https://genesiskreationsmedia.com/): Overview of Genesis Kreations and its media services.
- [About](https://genesiskreationsmedia.com/about): The studio's vision, team, and story.
- [Services](https://genesiskreationsmedia.com/services): Production, studio rental, broadcasting and other media services.
- [Academy](https://genesiskreationsmedia.com/academy): Media academy courses and training programs.
- [Digital Marketing](https://genesiskreationsmedia.com/digital-marketing): Digital marketing offerings for brands and creators.
- [Workshops](https://genesiskreationsmedia.com/workshops): Upcoming and ongoing hands-on workshops.
- [Gallery](https://genesiskreationsmedia.com/gallery): Photo gallery of work, events, and the studio.

## Contact

- Website: https://genesiskreationsmedia.com/
- Location: Chennai, India
